## Extension name

`mdv:???` <!-- if you propose it as a built-in -->
or your-namespace:??? <!-- third-party -->

## Syntax

<!-- Describe the markdown syntax users will type. Include examples. -->

```markdown
<!-- example -->
```

## Output

<!-- What HTML it should produce. Pseudo-tag tree is fine. -->

## Why mdview core (vs. third-party)

<!-- Built-ins are kept few and high-utility. If you propose a built-in, justify why this should be in core vs a separate npm package. -->

## Compatibility

- [ ] Doesn't break valid CommonMark
- [ ] Doesn't conflict with existing `mdv:*` extensions
- [ ] Renders gracefully (or visibly) when extension is disabled
